title.ko: 공기조화; 공기가습; 환기; 차폐를 위한 기류의 이용(발생 장소에서의 진애 또는 취기의 제거 B08B 15/00; 건물로부터 폐가스를 운반하기 위한 수직 배관 E04F 17/02; 연통을 위한 선단(terminals), 굴뚝 또는 환기축의 선단 F23L 17/02)
title.en: AIR-CONDITIONING; AIR-HUMIDIFICATION; VENTILATION; USE OF AIR CURRENTS FOR SCREENING (removing dirt or fumes from areas where they are produced B08B0015000000;vertical ducts for carrying away waste gases from buildings E04F0017020000;tops for chimneys or ventilating shafts, terminals for flues F23L0017020000)

definition.ko: 에어 컨디셔닝 룸 유닛; 중앙 시스템; 기타 시스템 또는 장치 F24F1/00, F24F3/00, F24F5/00 공기 가습 F24F6/00 환기 F24F7/00 가열, 냉각, 가습 또는 건조 이외의 치료 F24F8/00 기류에 의한 차폐 F24F9/00 제어 또는 안전 장치 F24F11/00 에너지 회수 시스템의 사용 F24F12/00 세부 F24F13/00

title.ko: 공기조화용 룸 유닛, 예. 분리되거나 독립적인 유닛 또는 중앙 통제실에서 나오는 일차 공기를 받는 유닛
title.en: Room units for air-conditioning, e.g. separate or self-contained units or units receiving primary air from a central station
characterised by a split arrangement, wherein parts of the air-conditioning system, e.g. evaporator and condenser, are in separately located units

title.ko: 실내 유닛, 예. 팬 코일 장치 (독립형 유닛 F24F1/02)
title.en: Indoor units, e.g. fan coil units (self-contained units F24F0001020000)
characterised by air outlets
having two or more outlet openings

title.ko: 팬에 특징이 있는 것 (1차 공기의 분사에 의해서 2차 공기가 유도되는 것 F24F1/01)
title.en: characterised by fans (with secondary air induced by injector action of the primary air F24F0001010000)
Centrifugal or radial fans
Cross-flow or tangential fans
Axial fans
having two or more fans
characterised by introduction of outside air to the room
in combination with simultaneous exhaustion of inside air

title.ko: 실내로부터의 내부 공기의 고갈을 특징으로 하는 것 (외부 공기가 동시에 도입되는 것 F24F1/0038)
title.en: characterised by exhaustion of inside air from the room (in combination with simultaneous introduction of outside air F24F0001003800)
characterised by mounting arrangements
mounted in the ceiling or at the ceiling
mounted on the floor; standing on the floor
mounted at least partially below the floor; with air distribution below the floor
mounted in or on a wall
characterised by heat exchangers
by the mounting or arrangement of the heat exchangers
by the shape of the heat exchangers or of parts thereof, e.g. of their fins
characterised by the arrangement of refrigerant piping outside the heat exchanger within the unit casing

title.ko: 급기 정화 수단을 구비한 것 (향수 또는 탈취 수단 F24F1/008)
title.en: with means for purifying supplied air (perfuming or deodorising means F24F0001008000)
characterised by the mounting or arrangement of filters
by electric means, e.g. ionisers or electrostatic separators
with perfuming or deodorising means
with dehumidification means
with humidification means

title.ko: 가열장치에 특징이 있는 것 (열교환기에 특징이 있는 것 F24F1/0059)
title.en: characterised by heating arrangements (characterised by heat exchangers F24F0001005900)
with additional radiant heat-discharging elements, e.g. electric heaters
using thermoelectric or thermomagnetic means, e.g. Peltier elements
in which secondary air is induced by injector action of the primary air

title.ko: 공기조화를 위한 독립적인 룸 유닛, 즉. 공통 케이싱 내부에 처리를 위한 모든 장치가 설치된 것
title.en: Self-contained room units for air-conditioning, i.e. with all apparatus for treatment installed in a common casing
comprising a compressor cycle
mounted in wall openings, e.g. in windows

title.ko: 공기 공급수단, 예. 팬 케이싱, 내부 댐퍼 또는 덕트, 에 특징이 있는 것 (1차 공기의 분출에 의해서 유도되는 2차 공기가 있는 것 F24F1/01)
title.en: characterised by air supply means, e.g. fan casings, internal dampers or ducts (with secondary air induced by injector action of the primary air F24F0001010000)
with horizontally arranged fan axis
with vertically arranged fan axis
characterised by the layout or mutual arrangement of components, e.g. of compressors or fans
characterised by mounting arrangements
penetrating a wall or window
mounted on a wall
suspended from the ceiling
characterised by heat exchangers
by the mounting or arrangement of the heat exchangers
by the shape of the heat exchangers or of parts thereof, e.g. of their fins
characterised by the arrangement of refrigerant piping outside the heat exchanger within the unit casing

title.ko: 급기 정화 수단을 구비한 것 (향기 또는 탈취 수단 F24F1/0355)
title.en: with means for purifying supplied air (perfuming or deodorising means F24F0001035500)
characterised by the mounting or arrangement of filters
by electric means, e.g. ionisers or electrostatic separators
with perfuming or deodorising means
with dehumidification means
with humidification means

title.ko: 가열 장치에 특징이 있는 것 (열교환기에 특징이 있는 것 F24F1/032)
title.en: characterised by heating arrangements (characterised by heat exchangers F24F0001032000)
with additional radiant heat-discharging elements, e.g. electric heaters
using thermoelectric or thermomagnetic means, e.g. Peltier elements
using water to enhance cooling, e.g. spraying onto condensers
Arrangements for portability

title.ko: 분리된 야외 유닛, 예. 압축기와 열 교환기를 구성하는 분리된 룸유닛에 연결된 야외 유닛
title.en: Separate outdoor units, e.g. outdoor unit to be linked to a separate room unit comprising a compressor and a heat exchanger

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 상반되는 지시가 없는 한, 최초개소 우선규칙이 적용되며, 즉. 각 계층적 레벨에서, 최초의 적절한 개소에 분류한다.

for connecting the separate outdoor unit to indoor units

title.ko: 외부 유닛에서 진동 또는 소음 방지(외부 유닛 압축기를 위해 F24F 1/12)

characterised by the use of internal combustion engines

Arrangement or mounting of the outdoor unit
Wall-mounted
Ceiling-mounted, e.g. below a balcony
under the floor level
Arrangement of multiple separate outdoor units

title.ko: 조정된 1차공기를 1개 이상의 중앙장치로부터, 2차처리가 수행되는 방 또는 공간 내부의 분배유닛으로 공급하는 공기조화시스템; 그러한 시스템을 위해서 특별히 설계된 장치 (룸 유닛 F24F 1/00)
title.en: Air-conditioning systems in which conditioned primary air is supplied from one or more central stations to distributing units in the rooms or spaces where it may receive secondary treatment; Apparatus specially designed for such systems (room units F24F0001000000)
characterised by the pressure or velocity of the primary air
operating with high pressure or high velocity

title.ko: 모든 처리가 중앙장치에서 주어지는 방식, 즉 전공기방식
title.en: Systems in which all treatment is given in the central station, i.e. all-air systems
with temperature control at constant rate of air-flow
Multiple duct systems, e.g. systems in which hot and cold air are supplied by separate circuits from the central station to mixing chambers in the spaces to be conditioned

title.ko: 공기가 적어도 부분적으로 조명기구상을 흐르고 조명기구의 열이 소비되거나 또는 사용되는 것 (조명용구와 결합된 방 또는 공간으로 공기를 흐르게 하거나 분배하기 위한 배출구 F24F 13/078)
title.en: the air at least partially flowing over lighting fixtures, the heat of which is dissipated or used (outlets for directing or distributing air into rooms or spaces combined with lighting fixtures F24F0013078000)
characterised by the arrangements for the supply of heat-exchange fluid for the subsequent treatment of primary air in the room units
with separate supply and return lines for hot and cold heat-exchange fluids
with separate supply lines and common return line for hot and cold heat-exchange fluids

title.ko: 가열과 냉각을 제외한 공기의 처리에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by the treatment of the air otherwise than by heating and cooling
by humidification; by dehumidification
with both heat and humidity transfer between supplied and exhausted air
with subsequent heating, i.e. with the air, given the required humidity in the central station, passing a heating element to achieve the required temperature

title.ko: 청정에 의한 것, 예. 여과에 의한 것; 살균에 의한 것; 오존화에 의한 것
title.en: by purification, e.g. by filtering; by sterilisation; by ozonisation
Clean air work stations, i.e. selected areas within a space to which filtered air is passed

title.ko: 청정실, 즉 여과된 공기의 균일한 흐름이 분산되는 밀폐된 공간 (천공 벽에 의한 공기 분배 F24F7/10)
title.en: Clean rooms, i.e. enclosed spaces in which a uniform flow of filtered air is distributed (air distribution by perforated walls F24F0007100000)

title.ko: F24F 1/00 또는 F24F 3/00에 분류되지 않는 공기조화방식 또는 공기조화장치

heated electrically

title.ko: 환기

using wall or window fans, displacing air through the wall or window

title.ko: 옥상환기 (지붕 덮개의 환기 E04D)

title.ko: 덕트장치를 갖는 것

title.en: with forced air circulation, e.g. by fan
with separate ducts for supplied and exhausted air

title.ko: 구멍이 있는 벽, 마루 또는 천정을 통해서 급기 또는 배기되는 것(공기를 안내하거나 분배하기 위한 내부부재 F24F 13/06)
title.en: with air supply, or exhaust, through perforated wall, floor or ceiling (outlet members for directing or distributing air F24F0013060000)

title.ko: 치료, 예. 난방, 냉방, 가습 또는 건조가 아닌 사람의 생활 또는 작업 공간에 공급되는 공기의 정화
